svg.title: SHP panel ETL pipeline
svg.desc: Four-step data transformation: source tables join into merged dataset, filters applied, variables constructed, final panel

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What rows exist after the joins?')
g.text: All 4 tables joined on (idpers, year, idhous)

g.onclick: sendPrompt('Which years and ages are kept?')

g.text: EDUCAT • HASKID (has children) • NAT (nationality) • PC19 • NETHHINCPP

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What is the structure of panel_final?')

svg.text: 2. After joins: Same P records, enriched with H, MP, SO data
3. After filters: ~15k–40k records (depends on year, age cutoff)
4. Final panel: All filtered records with 25 variables, ready for analysis
